headline: Intuit (INTU) to Cut 17% of Workforce in Strategic Pivot Toward AI Integration
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the cheap NASDAQ stocks to buy right now. On May 20, Reuters reported that Intuit announced plans to lay off approximately 17% of its global workforce, amounting to roughly 3,000 employees. CEO Sasan Goodarzi stated that the restructuring is intended to reduce organizational complexity and sharpen the company’s focus […]

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Intuit (INTU) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Intuit (INTU) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
